Off Calendar Nov-01-2011 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed, the court orders the case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Proceedings not reported. (610)

MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Order to Show Cause to All Counsel for failure to Complete Mediation is heard this day. Case has settled. Court ordered case scheduled for a dismissal Order to Show Cause re: CRC 3.1385 on 11/1/2011 at 10:00 AM, in Department 610. Proceedings not reported. (610)

Notice And Motion To Compel Compliance With Deposition Subpoenas; Separate Statement
Off Calendar Aug-12-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT PHILLIP SONG'S MOTION TO COMPEL COMPLIANCE WITH DEPOSITION SUBPOENAS. No appearances. The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Defendant's motion to compel compliance with deposition subpoenas is granted with the scope of the request being limited to medical and insurance records for treatment from the date of the accident forward. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi; Not reported
